description_long: This is a pair of low-top Adidas sneakers featuring a predominantly white exterior with subtle off-white discoloration and visible signs of wear, especially around the toe and sole areas. The shoes have a classic lace-up design with white laces threaded through metallic eyelets, and the Adidas logo is prominently displayed on the tongue in blue. The heel counter is accented with a blue strip, adding a pop of color to the otherwise neutral palette. The side panels display the iconic three-stripe Adidas branding, subtly stitched in white. The interior lining and insole are also white, with a faint blue pattern visible inside. The overall appearance suggests these shoes have been used in urban environments, with scuff marks and dirt accumulation on the midsoles and toe caps.
description: A pair of white Adidas low-top sneakers with blue heel accents, white laces, and visible signs of urban wear, including scuffed soles and toe caps.
description_view_0: Front view showing both shoes side by side, highlighting the white laces, Adidas logo on the tongue, and worn toe caps.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the three-stripe branding, blue heel accent, and scuffed midsole.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the blue heel counters, white uppers, and patterned insoles.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the three-stripe branding, blue heel accent, and worn midsole.
attribute_logo: Blue Adidas logo on the tongue of each shoe
